transcript: SPEAKER 1: Hey, quick one - did the county portal come back up? SPEAKER 2: Yeah, this morning. SPEAKER 1: Great, and the parking ratio question, was that four per thousand? SPEAKER 2: Correct, four per thousand. SPEAKER 1: Perfect, that's all I needed. Talk soon.
notes: Quick clarification call (~60% of real volume). Correct extraction is NOTHING — this record punishes fabrication.
